name: Cash - Operating Checking
description: Primary operating checking account at Granite National Bank. All Square settlements, payroll outflows, and vendor payments flow through this account.

name: Cash - Reserve Savings
description: Savings account holding ~2 months of operating expenses as reserve. Periodic transfers from checking.

name: Merchant Settlements Receivable
description: Net of card sales settled by Square or third-party processors but not yet deposited to checking. Cleared on each settlement transaction.

name: Inventory - Green Coffee
description: Unroasted green coffee beans held for roasting. Asset until roasted, then converted to roasted coffee inventory or expensed as wholesale COGS.

name: Inventory - Roasted Coffee
description: Roasted whole-bean coffee held for retail bag sale or wholesale shipment. Built up from green coffee plus a labor-and-overhead allocation.

name: Inventory - Retail Goods
description: Resale merchandise: t-shirts, mugs, brewing equipment, books. Not consumed in operations.

name: Inventory - Cups, Lids & Packaging
description: Disposable cups, lids, sleeves, wholesale bags, retail bags, stickers. Consumable, but tracked as inventory until used.

name: Prepaid Insurance
description: Annual general-liability and property-insurance premiums paid up-front, amortized monthly.

name: Equipment - Roasting
description: Capitalized roasting equipment: drum roaster, afterburner, destoner. Depreciated over useful life.

name: Equipment - Brewing & Espresso
description: Capitalized espresso machines, grinders, brewers, water filtration. Depreciated over useful life.

name: Equipment - POS & Technology
description: Capitalized point-of-sale hardware, tablets, customer-facing displays.

name: Accounts Payable
description: Amounts owed to vendors invoiced but not yet paid. Typical terms net 15 or net 30.

name: Sales Tax Payable
description: Sales tax collected from customers, owed to the state. NH has no general sales tax; populated by occasional out-of-state wholesale shipments.

name: Payroll Liabilities
description: Withheld federal and state employee taxes pending remittance via Gusto. Cleared on each tax-payment transaction.

name: Credit Card Payable
description: Outstanding balance on the business credit card, paid monthly.

name: Owner's Contributed Capital
description: Cash and property contributed by the owner at formation or via subsequent contributions.

name: Retained Earnings
description: Accumulated profits not yet distributed. Closed at year-end.

name: Owner Distributions
description: Cash distributions to the S-corp owner. Not deductible; reduces equity.

name: Sales - Retail Beverages
description: Drip coffee, espresso, latte, tea, and other prepared beverages sold in-store and to-go.

name: Sales - Retail Food
description: Pastries, sandwiches, and other prepared food sold in-store. Mostly purchased from local bakery for resale.

name: Sales - Retail Whole Bean
description: Bagged whole-bean and ground coffee sold to retail customers in-store.

name: Sales - Wholesale Coffee
description: Bulk roasted coffee sold to two regional cafe accounts. Invoiced separately from retail.

name: Sales - Retail Merchandise
description: T-shirts, mugs, brewing equipment, and books sold in-store.

name: COGS - Green Coffee
description: Cost of green coffee consumed in roasting. Recognized when coffee is roasted, not when purchased.

name: COGS - Dairy & Syrups
description: Cost of milk, alt-milk, and syrup consumed in beverage preparation.

name: COGS - Cups, Lids & Packaging
description: Cost of disposable cups, lids, sleeves, and bags consumed in service and retail sales.

name: COGS - Food for Resale
description: Cost of pastries and prepared food purchased from third parties for resale.

name: COGS - Retail Goods Resold
description: Cost of merchandise sold under Sales - Retail Merchandise. Cost basis only; no fabrication.

name: Rent - Storefront
description: Monthly rent on the storefront and roasting space. Includes CAM charges per lease.

name: Utilities - Electric
description: Electric utility billed monthly. High consumption from espresso machines, refrigeration, and roaster afterburner.

name: Utilities - Gas & Water
description: Natural gas (winter heat) and water/sewer combined into one account due to low volume.

name: Wages - Baristas
description: Hourly wages paid to part-time barista staff, run through Gusto bi-weekly.

name: Wages - Owner
description: S-corp reasonable-compensation salary paid to owner, run through Gusto.

name: Payroll Taxes
description: Employer share of payroll taxes (FICA, FUTA, SUTA) remitted via Gusto.

name: Payroll Service Fees
description: Monthly Gusto subscription and per-employee fees.

name: Workers Compensation Insurance
description: State-required workers' comp policy. Quarterly premiums.

name: General Liability Insurance
description: Annual general-liability policy covering slip-and-fall, product-liability, and basic property.

name: Merchant Processing Fees
description: Square card-processing fees deducted from settlements. Recognized as expense, gross of fees as revenue.

name: Bank Service Charges
description: Monthly bank account fees, ACH origination fees, and wire fees.

name: Office Supplies
description: Consumable office items: paper, pens, printer ink, kitchen supplies for staff break room. Does NOT include cups, lids, or food packaging.

name: Cleaning & Sanitation Supplies
description: Cleaning chemicals, sanitizer, mop heads, paper towels, restroom supplies.

name: Repairs & Maintenance
description: Service calls and parts for equipment and facility maintenance under the capitalization threshold.

name: Small Tools & Equipment
description: Equipment purchases under $500 expensed rather than capitalized: hand grinders, tampers, thermometers, small parts.

name: Marketing & Advertising
description: Local newspaper ads, Instagram boosts, sponsorship of community events, printed marketing materials.

name: Software Subscriptions
description: Recurring software: Square, Toast, QuickBooks Online, Mailchimp, scheduling tools.

name: Professional Services - Accounting
description: Bookkeeper monthly fee, annual tax preparation.

name: Permits & Licenses
description: City business license, food-service license, weights-and-measures, retail merchant permits.

name: Telephone & Internet
description: Business phone line and storefront internet. Critical for POS uptime.

name: Vehicle & Delivery
description: Fuel and minor maintenance for the wholesale-delivery vehicle. Mileage rate alternative not used.

name: Training & Continuing Education
description: SCA classes, latte-art workshops, food-safety certifications, industry-research trips to peer cafes.
